name: Xodexa-Ω Gauntlet
note: The MVP's real, working pack. Adversarial reasoning, long-context, hallucination resistance, novel problems.

name: Xodexa Reasoning Gauntlet
note: ARC-style abstraction, hidden-rule induction, counterfactual logic, symbolic manipulation.

name: Xodexa Code Gauntlet
note: SWE-style bug fixing, hidden unit tests, multi-file refactors, perf + security hardening.

name: Xodexa Agent Gauntlet
note: GAIA/tau-bench-style tool use over simulated browser/file/db/CRM sandboxes.

name: Xodexa Science Gauntlet
note: GPQA-level reasoning, experimental design, causal/statistical inference, paper critique.

name: Xodexa Multimodal Gauntlet
note: Charts, tables, diagrams, multi-image comparison, visual contradiction detection.

name: Xodexa Safety & Robustness Gauntlet
note: Instruction hierarchy, prompt-injection resistance, sycophancy, over-refusal — abstracted, non-operational scenarios only.

name: Xodexa Frontier Exam (HLE-class)
note: Inspired by Humanity's Last Exam (Scale AI / CAIS): expert-level, subject-diverse, multimodal, closed-ended questions at the frontier of human knowledge. Ranked by accuracy via Rank (Upper Bound) statistical significance; calibration error reported as a co-equal honesty metric. A held-out private set measures overfitting/contamination. Frontier models score low (single digits to ~46%) with systematic overconfidence.

name: Xodexa Frontier Exam — Text Only
note: Text-only subset of the Xodexa Frontier Exam for non-multimodal models.
